---
title: "Casuality"
source: "Lecture Material"
author: "TBD"
institution: "University of Kansas"
competency: Statistical Foundation
main-format: PPT Slide

toc: true
toc-title: "On this page"
---

## Material Description

This module is a lecture slide that explains casuality.

## Module Materials

You can access the material [here](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1QZouHMcKb1czioT0ISUqtFnOcHXMDt-QRy_4GbD5b64/edit#slide=id.g10c859c8454_0_0)
